dust_scenarios.name: Low Visibility Dust Haze
dust_scenarios.description: A light haze of suspended dust reduces visibility slightly. Minimal physical risk, but precision tasks requiring optical sensors are compromised.

dust_scenarios.name: Moderate Dust Squall
dust_scenarios.description: Gusts of wind kick up significant dust, clogging mechanical joints and potentially damaging exposed components. Outdoor movement is possible but risky.

dust_scenarios.name: High-Velocity Dust Storm
dust_scenarios.description: A severe storm with high-speed particulate matter. Poses a significant physical risk to all external hardware. All outdoor operations must be suspended.

dust_scenarios.name: Electrostatic Dust Event
dust_scenarios.description: Fine dust particles become highly charged, posing a severe risk of short-circuits to all external electronic systems. All agents must enter a shielded standby mode.

dust_scenarios.name: Passing Rover Dust Plume
dust_scenarios.description: A temporary plume of dust kicked up by a nearby moving vehicle. Only affects operations in the immediate vicinity for a very short duration.
